revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大坂山口神社 |画像 = [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[香芝市]][[逢坂]]5-831 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[大山祇命]]、[[須佐之男命]]、[[天児屋根命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=大坂
山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居]] '''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[香芝市]]穴虫（あなむし）にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[近鉄大阪線]]の[[二上駅]]の南西近隣に鎮座している。 逢坂地区の[[大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|大坂山口神社]]と共に、『[[古事記]]』『[[日本書紀]]』の[[崇神天皇]]9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は[[宇陀市]]の[[墨坂神社 (宇陀市)|墨坂神社]]に比定されている）[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース。 また、同じく逢坂地区の大坂山口神社と共に、[[大和国の式内社一覧|大和国の式内社]]の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html 大坂山口神社（穴虫）] - 香芝市。 == 祭神 == * [[大山祇命]] * [[須佐之男命]] * [[天児屋根命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおさかやまくちしんしや かしはしあなむし}} [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

{{Expand Japanese|大坂山口神社 (香芝市穴虫)}}

{{Infobox religious building

| native_name = 大坂山口神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Expand Japanese|大坂山口神社 (香芝市穴虫)}}

{{Infobox religious building

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{Expand Japanese|大坂山口神社 (香芝市穴虫)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Oosakayamaguchi Shrine

| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Expand Japanese|大坂山口神社 (香芝市穴虫)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Oosakayamaguchi Shrine
| native_name = 大坂山口神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Oosakayamaguchi Shrine

| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

{{Infobox religious building

| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{Expand Japanese|大坂山口神社 (香芝市穴虫)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Oosakayamaguchi Shrine
| native_name = 大坂山口神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Oosakayamaguchi Shrine
| coordinates = {{coord|34.545305|135.685151}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

revision.comment: 2 revisions imported
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 大坂山口神社 |画像 = [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[香芝市]][[逢坂 (香芝市)|逢坂]]5-831 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[大山祇命]]、[[須佐之男命]]、[[天児屋根命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=大坂
山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居]] '''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[香芝市]]穴虫（あなむし）にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[近鉄大阪線]]の[[二上駅]]の南西近隣に鎮座している。 逢坂地区の[[大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|大坂山口神社]]と共に、『[[古事記]]』『[[日本書紀]]』の[[崇神天皇]]9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は[[宇陀市]]の[[墨坂神社 (宇陀市)|墨坂神社]]に比定されている）[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース。 また、同じく逢坂地区の大坂山口神社と共に、[[大和国の式内社一覧|大和国の式内社]]の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html 大坂山口神社（穴虫）] - 香芝市。 == 祭神 == * [[大山祇命]] * [[須佐之男命]] * [[天児屋根命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおさかやまくちしんしや かしはしあなむし}} [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

|画像 = [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[香芝市]][[逢坂 (香芝市)|逢坂]]5-831 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[大山祇命]]、[[須佐之男命]]、[[天児屋根命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=大坂
山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居]] '''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[香芝市]]穴虫（あなむし）にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[近鉄大阪線]]の[[二上駅]]の南西近隣に鎮座している。 逢坂地区の[[大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|大坂山口神社]]と共に、『[[古事記]]』『[[日本書紀]]』の[[崇神天皇]]9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は[[宇陀市]]の[[墨坂神社 (宇陀市)|墨坂神社]]に比定されている）[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース。 また、同じく逢坂地区の大坂山口神社と共に、[[大和国の式内社一覧|大和国の式内社]]の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html 大坂山口神社（穴虫）] - 香芝市。 == 祭神 == * [[大山祇命]] * [[須佐之男命]] * [[天児屋根命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおさかやまくちしんしや かしはしあなむし}} [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] ==End Japanese==

{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = [[奈良県]][[香芝市]][[逢坂 (香芝市)|逢坂]]5-831 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = [[大山祇命]]、[[須佐之男命]]、[[天児屋根命]] |社格 = [[式内社]]論社、旧[[村社]] |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=大坂
山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居]] '''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、[[奈良県]][[香芝市]]穴虫（あなむし）にある[[神社]]。 == 概要 == [[近鉄大阪線]]の[[二上駅]]の南西近隣に鎮座している。 逢坂地区の[[大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|大坂山口神社]]と共に、『[[古事記]]』『[[日本書紀]]』の[[崇神天皇]]9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は[[宇陀市]]の[[墨坂神社 (宇陀市)|墨坂神社]]に比定されている）[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース。 また、同じく逢坂地区の大坂山口神社と共に、[[大和国の式内社一覧|大和国の式内社]]の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html 大坂山口神社（穴虫）] - 香芝市。 == 祭神 == * [[大山祇命]] * [[須佐之男命]] * [[天児屋根命]] == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居]] '''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}穴虫（あなむし）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 == 概要 == {{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|二上駅|Q7034597}}の南西近隣に鎮座している。 逢坂地区の{{jalink|大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|Q135069036|大坂山口神社}}と共に、『{{jalink|古事記|Q813031}}』『{{jalink|日本書紀|Q813935}}』の{{jalink|崇神天皇|Q333530}}9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は{{jalink|宇陀市|Q863747}}の{{jalink|墨坂神社 (宇陀市)||墨坂神社}}に比定されている）[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース。 また、同じく逢坂地区の大坂山口神社と共に、{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html 大坂山口神社（穴虫）] - 香芝市。 == 祭神 == * {{jalink|大山祇命}} * {{jalink|須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|天児屋根命}} == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} == 外部リンク == * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]]

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居]] '''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}穴虫（あなむし）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 概要 === {{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|二上駅|Q7034597}}の南西近隣に鎮座している。 逢坂地区の{{jalink|大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|Q135069036|大坂山口神社}}と共に、『{{jalink|古事記|Q813031}}』『{{jalink|日本書紀|Q813935}}』の{{jalink|崇神天皇|Q333530}}9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は{{jalink|宇陀市|Q863747}}の{{jalink|墨坂神社 (宇陀市)||墨坂神社}}に比定されている）[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース。 また、同じく逢坂地区の大坂山口神社と共に、{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html 大坂山口神社（穴虫）] - 香芝市。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大山祇命}} * {{jalink|須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|天児屋根命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおさかやまくちしんしや かしはしあなむし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

content == {{神社 |名称 = 大坂山口神社 |画像 = [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
拝殿
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}{{jalink|逢坂 (香芝市)||逢坂}}5-831 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = {{jalink|大山祇命}}、{{jalink|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|天児屋根命}} |社格 = {{jalink|式内社}}論社、旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月16日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=大坂
山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居]] '''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}穴虫（あなむし）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。 === 概要 === {{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|二上駅|Q7034597}}の南西近隣に鎮座している。 逢坂地区の{{jalink|大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|Q135069036|大坂山口神社}}と共に、『{{jalink|古事記|Q813031}}』『{{jalink|日本書紀|Q813935}}』の{{jalink|崇神天皇|Q333530}}9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は{{jalink|宇陀市|Q863747}}の{{jalink|墨坂神社 (宇陀市)||墨坂神社}}に比定されている）[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース。 また、同じく逢坂地区の大坂山口神社と共に、{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html 大坂山口神社（穴虫）] - 香芝市。 === 祭神 === * {{jalink|大山祇命}} * {{jalink|須佐之男命}} * {{jalink|天児屋根命}} === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} === 外部リンク === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:おおさかやまくちしんしや かしはしあなむし}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine |Image = [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |Location = {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashiba City|Q696643}}{{jalink|Ōsaka (Kashiba City)||Ōsaka}}5-831 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}} |Shrine status = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} candidate shrine, former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Alternative names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = October 16 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Ōsaka
Yamaguchi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|Torii]] '''Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine''' (おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Anamushi, {{jalink|Kashiba City|Q696643}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === It is enshrined southwest of {{jalink|Futakami Station|Q7034597}} on the {{jalink|Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545}}. Together with {{jalink|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Sujin|Q333530}} in the '{{jalink|Kojiki|Q813031}}' and '{{jalink|Nihon Shoki|Q813935}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{jalink|Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)||Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{jalink|Uda City|Q863747}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|Shikinaisha of Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Osaka Yamaguchi Shrine Kashiba Anamushi}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:need translation]]

content == {{Shinto shrine |Name = Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine |Image = [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |Location = {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}{{jalink|Kashiba City|Q696643}}{{jalink|Ōsaka (Kashiba City)||Ōsaka}}5-831 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}、{{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}} |Shrine status = {{jalink|Shikinaisha}} candidate shrine, former {{jalink|Village shrine|Q134917284}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Alternative names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = October 16 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Ōsaka
Yamaguchi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|Torii]] '''Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine''' (おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ) is a {{jalink|Shinto shrine|Q845945}} located in Anamushi, {{jalink|Kashiba City|Q696643}}, {{jalink|Nara Prefecture|Q131287}}. === Overview === It is enshrined southwest of {{jalink|Futakami Station|Q7034597}} on the {{jalink|Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545}}. Together with {{jalink|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{jalink|Emperor Sujin|Q333530}} in the '{{jalink|Kojiki|Q813031}}' and '{{jalink|Nihon Shoki|Q813935}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{jalink|Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)||Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{jalink|Uda City|Q863747}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{jalink|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|Shikinaisha of Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{jalink|Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{jalink|Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Osaka Yamaguchi Shrine Kashiba Anamushi}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]]

Yamaguchi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|Torii]] '''Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine''' (おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Anamushi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba City|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === It is enshrined southwest of {{ill|lt=Futakami Station|Q7034597|WD=Q7034597|1=Nijō Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Osaka Yamaguchi Shrine Kashiba Anamushi}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:大和国の式内社]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:奈良県の旧村社]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Yamaguchi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|Torii]] '''Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine''' (おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Anamushi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba City|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === It is enshrined southwest of {{ill|lt=Futakami Station|Q7034597|WD=Q7034597|1=Nijō Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

[[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba City|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Ōsaka (Kashiba City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōsaka}}5-831 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}}、{{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} |Shrine status = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} candidate shrine, former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Alternative names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = October 16 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Ōsaka
Yamaguchi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|Torii]] '''Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine''' (おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Anamushi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba City|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === It is enshrined southwest of {{ill|lt=Futakami Station|Q7034597|WD=Q7034597|1=Nijō Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]]

Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]] [[Category:moved from a redlink]]

[[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi) haiden.jpg|250px]]
Worship hall (haiden)
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Kashiba City|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}{{ill|lt=Ōsaka (Kashiba City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Ōsaka}}5-831 |Coordinates = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deities = {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}}、{{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}}、{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} |Shrine status = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286}} candidate shrine, former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |Founded = |Main hall = |Alternative names = |Pilgrimage affiliation = |Annual festival = October 16 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=Ōsaka
Yamaguchi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|Torii]] '''Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine''' (おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Anamushi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba City|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === It is enshrined southwest of {{ill|lt=Futakami Station|Q7034597|WD=Q7034597|1=Nijō Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]][[Category:Move targets ∪ destinations]] [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]]

Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Qq but with jawiki]]

Yamaguchi Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (anamushi)1.jpg|thumb|250px|Torii]] '''Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine''' (おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|WD=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Anamushi, {{ill|lt=Kashiba City|Q696643|WD=Q696643|1=Kashiba, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|WD=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === Overview === It is enshrined southwest of {{ill|lt=Futakami Station|Q7034597|WD=Q7034597|1=Nijō Station (Nara)}} on the {{ill|lt=Kintetsu Osaka Line|Q1052545|WD=Q1052545|1=Osaka Line}}. Together with {{ill|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba City Ōsaka)|Q135069036|WD=Q135069036|lt=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine|1=Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Kashiba)}} in the Ōsaka district, it is identified as the shrine that enshrined the Ōsaka deity mentioned in the dream oracle recorded in the 9th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Sujin|Q333530|WD=Q333530|1=Emperor Sujin}} in the '{{ill|lt=Kojiki|Q813031|WD=Q813031|1=Kojiki}}' and '{{ill|lt=Nihon Shoki|Q813935|WD=Q813935|1=Nihon Shoki}}': “With eight red shields and eight red spears, enshrine the god of Sumisaka; with eight black shields and eight black spears, enshrine the god of Ōsaka.” (Incidentally, the god of Sumisaka is identified with {{ill|lt=Sumisaka Shrine (Uda City)|UNKNOWN|lt=Sumisaka Shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Uda City|Q863747|WD=Q863747|1=Uda, Nara}}.)[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf Ōsaka / Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine] - Kashiba City Futakami Mountain Museum[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, deity statues, and treasure items (Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine Main Hall, Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine deity statues and treasure items)] - Nara Prefecture Historical and Cultural Resources Database. In addition, together with the Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine in the Ōsaka district, it is one of the candidate shrines (ronsha) for Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine, which is one of the {{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|Q11433427|WD=Q11433427|lt=Shikinaisha of Yamato Province|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}}.[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/soshiki/15/4951.html Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)] - Kashiba City. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|WD=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi-no-Mikoto|1=Ōyamatsumi}} * {{ill|Susanoo-no-Mikoto|lt=Susanoo-no-Mikoto|WD=Q272993|1=Susanoo-no-Mikoto}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ame-no-Koyane-no-Mikoto|1=Ame-no-Koyane|WD=Q2564508}} === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ōsaka Yamaguchi Shrine (Anamushi)]][[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Son-sha in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:香芝市の建築物]] [[Category:香芝市の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]
